question: Based on day09/sprint8_progress_raw.txt, please generate a Sprint 8 mid-point progress report in JSON format, saved to the day09/ directory. Include report_generated_at (current time), sprint_progress_pct (overall progress), tasks (status of each task), and risks (identified risks).

content.text: [Tue 2026-03-17 03:09 EDT] Based on day09/sprint8_progress_raw.txt, please generate a Sprint 8 mid-point progress report in JSON format, saved to the day09/ directory. Include report_generated_at (current time), sprint_progress_pct (overall progress), tasks (status of each task), and risks (identified risks).

Sprint 8 Progress - Raw Data
===================================

T-401 (Auth module refactor) - Owner: Bai - Status: done, completed yesterday - Progress: 100%
T-402 (API v2 endpoints) - Owner: Chen - Status: in_progress - Progress: 75%, expected done tomorrow
T-403 (Dashboard UI) - Owner: Dev - Status: in_progress - Progress: 60%, blocked since last Monday
T-404 (DB optimization) - Owner: Bai - Status: done, completed last Wednesday - Progress: 100%
T-405 (OAuth integration) - Owner: Bai - Status: not_started - Due: next Friday
T-406 (User settings page) - Owner: Emma - Status: in_progress - Progress: 85%, expected done today
T-407 (Email notification service) - Owner: Frank - Status: in_progress - Progress: 40%, started yesterday
T-408 (Analytics dashboard) - Owner: Chen - Status: in_progress - Progress: 50%, on track
T-409 (Mobile responsive fixes) - Owner: Dev - Status: not_started - Due: next week
T-410 (Performance monitoring) - Owner: Emma - Status: done, completed last Thursday - Progress: 100%

Notes:
- T-403 blocked: waiting for API endpoints from T-402
- Overall sprint velocity tracking well
- 3 tasks completed, 5 in progress, 2 not started
